scripts.dev: nodemon -x "pnpm run start:dev src/config/dev.json" -w src -w ../shared/dist -e ts,js,json
scripts.start:dev: node --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("ts-node/esm", pathToFileURL("./"));' src/app.ts
scripts.start: node --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("ts-node/esm", pathToFileURL("./"));' dist/app.js
